summary: An alarming explosion occurs, leading to a warning for Miss Yeon-Ha. Kim Ha-Jin, an "extra" determined to increase his influence, chooses to engage in the dangerous event despite being told to stay out. He expertly utilizes his unique ability, 'Bullet Time,' which slows down time, allowing him to easily dispatch a large but unintelligent enemy force. Following his successful intervention, the area is cleared, and the mission results for Team 5 are displayed.
key_moments: An initial powerful explosion causes alarm and prompts a warning to Miss Yeon-Ha.
Kim Ha-Jin, an "extra" aiming to gain influence, deliberately jumps into a dangerous event against instructions.
Ha-Jin activates his 'Bullet Time' ability to slow time, allowing him to precisely target enemies.
He successfully defeats the enemy units using his unique skill.
The mission is cleared, and Team 5's performance results are displayed.
